scope: corrected no-training FP32-Jacobian/FP64-Gram quotient-tangent audit of the failed one-state panel; no optimizer or model change and no later Gate

decision_rule.rank_deficient: repair the equivariant vector-output basis before any optimizer experiment
decision_rule.full_rank_ill_conditioned: qualify one principled vector-output preconditioner at unchanged model capacity and budget
decision_rule.full_rank_well_conditioned: inspect optimizer update and nonlinear curvature without adding steps or capacity
decision_rule.boundary: This corrected no-training audit cannot change historical H1a failures, initialize production or authorize H1b-H6, tensor, oracle, relaxation, DFT or DFPT.
